title: senecio munozii
intro: Senecio munozii, also known as Munoz's ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Senecio munozii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Senecio munozii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be monitored due to potential toxicity.
